title: Principal Frontend Developer at SAP India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at SAP India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? SAP India Capital India in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
